name: Stuffed Mushrooms

ingredients.item: cremini mushroom caps. Reserve and chop up stems for filling
butter for dipping the mushroom tops and drizzling

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, saute sausage in 1 T olive oil, breaking it up with your wooden spoon in little pieces. Add 1 T butter and chopped mushroom stems. Saute until sausage is cooked and mushroom stems are tender. Add garlic and saute for a minute. Drain any excess grease and transfer to a bowl. Add parsley, cream cheese, sage, salt, pepper, and parmesan. Mix well. Melt 3 T butter in a bowl. Dip each mushroom cap in butter, fill cap with stuffing and top with breadcrumbs. Line up on a parchment-lined baking sheet. You can drizzle a little butter on top of the breadcrumbs as well. Bake for 25-35 minutes, they are done when the mushroom caps are tender, and the breading is golden. Serve as an appetizer. Serves 2-3. Olé
